productDisplayName: Nike Men Liteforce Green Casual Shoes
description: Combining the style and flair of canvas shoes with the durability and comfort of running shoes, the nike Liteforce puts the groove back in your style.UpperCanvas upper with synthetic leather overlaysnike swoosh overlay near the midfoot region for added shoe structure Padded collar with a mesh liningFootbed with fabric lining for breathabilityLacing system for all-day comfortMidsolePhylon midsole with PU foxingOutsoleHerringbone grooves on the outsole for added traction and absolute gripWash careMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot water Rub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brush Wash off with lukewarm water
